# DrNote

DrNote is a mobile-first medical exam prep app for USMLE, MRCP, SMLE, and MCCQE with practice questions, mock exams, AI tutoring, notes, analytics, and review workflows.

## Primary Routes
- Home: https://drnote.app/
- Sitemap: https://drnote.app/sitemap.xml

## Exam Prep Coverage
- USMLE Step 1: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1
  Subjects: Pathology, Pharmacology, Physiology, Biochemistry
  Question bank size: 3,180 questions
  subjects: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1/subjects
  tags: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1/tags
  review: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1/review
  analysis: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1/analysis
  sessions: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1/sessions
  notes: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1/notes
  library: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1/library
  ask: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1/ask
  practice: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1/practice
  mock: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1/mock
  report: https://drnote.app/exams/usmle-step-1/report
- MRCP Part 1: https://drnote.app/exams/mrcp-part-1
  Subjects: Cardiology, Respiratory, Renal, Neurology
  Question bank size: 2,260 questions
- SMLE: https://drnote.app/exams/smle
  Subjects: Medicine, Surgery, Pediatrics, OB/GYN
  Question bank size: 1,840 questions
- MCCQE Part I: https://drnote.app/exams/mccqe
  Subjects: Family Medicine, Psychiatry, Ethics, Emergency
  Question bank size: 1,725 questions

## Product Summary
- Medical exam preparation for USMLE Step 1, MRCP Part 1, SMLE, and MCCQE Part I.
- Features include practice questions, subject drills, tags, review queues, timed mock exams, notes, saved library, AI tutor, and performance analysis.
- Audience: medical students, residents, and clinicians preparing for licensing and membership exams.
